title: Horimiya Custom GUI Pack
body:
**![](https://i.imgur.com/Xwb2E8x.png)**

**It's GUI ONLY Resource pack so you can freely use it with other resource packs. Just place it on top of resource pack you use.**  
**This is a GUI packed themed towards the show "Horimiya ". Don't hesitate to comment down below, I have even changed hot bar as well hope you enjoy. The palette that I choose is Pink & Yellow but maybe in the future, If you guys want other colors like Red & white or any colors else.**  
**please tell me I will think about it!**  
**If you found any bugs please report to me I will fix it as soon as I can.**

**Images**

[**![](https://i.imgur.com/B04ZDy6.jpg)**](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https%253a%252f%252flistarmc.com%252f)
